torch_pattern: split_size = input.size(-1) // 2; tensA, tensB = torch.split(input, split_size_or_sections=[split_size, split_size], dim={DIM}); out = tensA * torch.nn.functional.silu(tensB)

constraints.input_last_dim: must be even (split into two equal halves)

source: registered golden function _golden_function_swiglu; unit test test_unary_swiglu_ttnn
applicability_notes: Fuses split-in-half along last dim + SiLU gate + elementwise multiply (SwiGLU / gated SiLU) into a single unary composite op. First half is the value branch, second half is the gate branch (gate = silu(second_half)). Output last-dim size is input.size(-1)//2.
